long_term_goal: A grassroots football club secretary can manage their entire club from one app, spending less than 10 minutes per week on admin.
sprint_questions: Who are the users, and what do they actually need?
What are the hard technical constraints for v1?
What design principles should govern every screen?
What tech stack decisions have been made, and what is still open?
key_decisions: Auth: NextAuth.js v5, magic link + Google OAuth (D-002)
Secretary-first constraint adopted as governing design principle
next_action: Run Sprint 001 — Member Onboarding. Target the invite-link to squad-list moment.
open_questions: How does the secretary generate and manage invite links?
What happens when an invite link expires?
Does the secretary need to see which members have accepted their invite?
